# Circuit Parity Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/release/render-parity-matrix.ts. Do not edit by hand. -->

Compares the checked-in original Circuit snapshot with the current capability snapshot. A `release_blocker` gap is known and tracked; it does not mean the release is ready.

## Original Parity Surface

| Flow | Capability | Status | Modes | Stage Path | Outputs / Reports | Checkpoint | Review | Verification | Worker Handoff | Continuity | Proof | Readiness |

| Explore | flow:explore | implemented | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite, tournament; expected: lite, default, deep, tournament, autonomous | Frame, Analyze, Plan or Decision, Close | current: analysis.md, brief.md, decision.md, plan.md, result.md; expected: brief.md, analysis.md, plan.md, decision.md, result.md | current: Compiled checkpoints can pause, auto-resolve safe defaults, or resume from operator input.; expected: One tradeoff checkpoint for tournament decisions; autonomous carries ambiguity forward. | current: Compiled review stages or reviewer relays are present.; expected: Embedded critique/stress testing in tournament and decision modes. | current: Explore deep mode records seam proof through analysis and embedded critique rather than command verification.; expected: Seam proof in deep mode when a plan has a risky assumption. | current: Compiled worker handoffs write request, receipt, result, and report evidence where applicable.; expected: Evidence probes and tournament proposal/review rounds. | current: Runs persist manifest, trace, result, and checkpoint resume data in the run folder.; expected: Produces plan/decision output that can transfer to doing work. | Golden decision or tournament run. |  |

Explicit Build checkpoint golden run.; expected: Routed and explicit Build golden runs. |  |
| Fix | flow:fix | implemented | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite; expected: lite, default, deep, autonomous | Frame, Analyze, Fix, Verify, Review, Close | current: analysis.md, brief.md, result.md, review.md; expected: brief.md, analysis.md, review.md, result.md | current: Compiled checkpoints can pause, auto-resolve safe defaults, or resume from operator input.; expected: Escalates after bounded no-repro or root-cause search. | current: Compiled review stages or reviewer relays are present.; expected: Lite skips independent review; standard and above run it. | current: Compiled verification steps write command-result reports before close.; expected: Regression test or diagnostic proof is required where reproducible. | current: Compiled worker handoffs write request, receipt, result, and report evidence where applicable.; expected: Diagnosis and fix may use worker sessions by mode. | current: Runs persist manifest, trace, result, and checkpoint resume data in the run folder.; expected: Active run and handoff support. | Fix golden run with regression evidence. |  |

| utility | Review | utility:review | implemented | /circuit:review |  |  | current: Standalone Review runs a fresh reviewer relay and writes a severity-ordered review result.; expected: Independent reviewer starts fresh and reports findings by severity. |  |  |  | Standalone Review golden run. |  |
| customization | Create | utility:create | implemented | /circuit:create |  | current: Publishing requires an explicit --yes confirmation after draft validation.; expected: Waits for publish confirmation before promotion. |  | current: The generated compiled flow parses and passes flow-kind policy validation.; expected: Validates the draft through engine bootstrap. |  | current: Published custom flows are written to the user-global custom flow root.; expected: Publishes into user-global custom circuit root after confirmation. | Create or custom-connector proof scenario. |  |
